nativeProps: React input attributes except owned type, value, defaultValue, and change fields

compositionPolicy.model: datetime-local remains an explicitly unzoned local wall-time value.
compositionPolicy.zone: Optional zone context describes consumer interpretation but never silently converts or changes serialization.
compositionPolicy.native: The real input owns validation, reset, mobile behavior, and canonical local serialization.
compositionPolicy.wallTime: An explicit synchronous consumer adapter can classify valid, repeated, or nonexistent local times; reject is the default ambiguity policy, and successful resolved instants serialize only through an explicitly named hidden control.
